name: agent-ic-hermes-hackathon
description: Agent IC: Hermes/Nemotron enterprise AI pilot investment committee demo with Stripe spend governance and ROI kill/continue audit logs.

scripts.demo:video-v13: npm run demo:reset-v11 && npm run demo:voice-v13 && npm run demo:terminals-v13 && npm run demo:record-v13 && npm run demo:captions-v13 && npm run demo:edit-plan-v13 && npm run demo:render-v13
scripts.demo:video-v14: npm run demo:reset-v11 && npm run demo:record-v14 && cp demo-out/agent-ic-audio-mastered-v13.wav remotion/public/agent-ic-audio-mastered-v14.wav && npm run demo:edit-plan-v14 && npm run demo:render-v14 && AGENT_IC_QA_SKIP_OCR=true npm run demo:qa-v14
scripts.demo:video-v15: npm run demo:reset-v11 && npm run demo:terminals-v15 && npm run demo:record-v15 && cp demo-out/agent-ic-audio-mastered-v13.wav remotion/public/agent-ic-audio-mastered-v15.wav && cp remotion/src/captions-v14.json remotion/src/captions-v15.json && npm run demo:edit-plan-v15 && npm run demo:render-v15 && AGENT_IC_QA_SKIP_OCR=true npm run demo:qa-v15
scripts.demo:video-v16: npm run demo:record-v16 && npm run demo:post-produce-v16 && npm run demo:qa-v16 && cp demo-out/video-qa-report-v16.json demo-out/video-qa-report-final.json
scripts.demo:video-v10: npm run demo:reset-v10 && npm run demo:voice-v10 && npm run demo:record-v10 && npm run demo:captions-v10 && npm run demo:render-v10

scripts.demo:video-v6: npm run demo:export-payload-v6 && npm run demo:record-v6 && npm run demo:voice-v6 && npm run demo:captions-v6 && npm run demo:render-v6
scripts.demo:video-v7: npm run demo:export-payload-v7 && npm run demo:record-v7 && npm run demo:voice-v7 && npm run demo:agentic-edit-v7 && npm run demo:captions-v7 && npm run demo:render-v7
